basics.name: Tshepiso Masilo Simon Motaung
basics.label: Systems Administrator & DevOps Engineer
basics.summary: Systems Administrator and Enterprise Operations professional with experience supporting mission-critical banking infrastructure within the Nedbank Command Center. Skilled in enterprise systems monitoring, incident management, system health checks, batch processing, production support, and infrastructure troubleshooting.
basics.status: Active (YES Youth Programme at Nedbank Command Center)

highlights: Monitor Enterprise Systems Management Tools to ensure the stability, performance, and availability of critical banking systems and services.
Perform real-time monitoring of infrastructure alerts and operational events, ensuring timely incident identification and escalation.
Provide first-level support and targeted second-level troubleshooting in accordance with defined operational procedures and standards.
Conduct documented system health checks within agreed timelines and proactively identify risks impacting service availability.
Execute implementation plans for infrastructure upgrades, system enhancements, and operational changes.
Support batch processing activities to ensure successful completion of scheduled business-critical processes.
Enhanced backend services using Java and SQL within enterprise support systems.
Integrated REST and SOAP APIs across distributed enterprise applications and legacy systems.
Containerized backend applications using Docker and supported deployment orchestration on Kubernetes platforms.
Assisted with testing, logging analysis, debugging, and production readiness validation activities.
Supported cloud infrastructure deployments within Microsoft Azure and Red Hat OpenShift environments.
Monitored platform health and assisted with troubleshooting operational issues.
Configured and documented GitOps deployment workflows using ArgoCD.
Received the Gold Accolade Award and Certificate of Recognition for outstanding contributions.

projects.title: Mobile Navigation Ecosystem
projects.description: Developed an indoor/outdoor mobile navigation application during studies at University of Johannesburg using advanced mapping layers.

projects.title: Cross-Platform Backend Application
projects.description: Designed and deployed a cross-platform data handling engine utilizing non-relational database structures for speed and modern data indexing.
